Moving sale

I'm moving — take my stuff.

Clearing out the apartment. Most of it's free or cheap, first come first served. See something you want? Tap “I'll take it” and I'll get back to you. Everything is from a smoke-free and pet-free home! Priority to the folks who can come pick up during the last week of July! I still need some furniture to live until then — thanks for understanding 🥹

1 Browse
2 Tap “I'll take it” on anything you want
